Name: FSoundClassAdjuster
Description: Elements of data for sound group volume control

Variables.Name: SoundClassObject
Variables.Description: The sound class this adjuster affects.

Variables.Name: VolumeAdjuster
Variables.Description: A multiplier applied to the volume.

Variables.Name: PitchAdjuster
Variables.Description: A multiplier applied to the pitch.

Variables.Name: bApplyToChildren
Variables.Description: Set to true to apply this adjuster to all children of the sound class.
